node.text: Rice has 8 Bags ready to sell.
Ishaq is clocked in and can record sales.
You must be signed in to continue.
Local subscription data is shown only as a fallback. Reconnect to request an upgrade from the business account.

node.content-desc: Starter, For one shop starting with simple sales and stock tracking., Current, Businesses, Up to 1, Products, Up to 25, Staff, Up to 2, Standard support, Current plan

node.text: For one shop starting with simple sales and stock tracking.

node.content-desc: Growth, For growing teams that need more attendants and history., Most popular, Businesses, Up to 3, Products, Up to 150, Staff, Up to 10, Priority support, Online required

node.text: For growing teams that need more attendants and history.
